name: Healing Done Wrong | Simon 'Ghost' Riley
description:
⋆𐙚₊˚⊹♡ TF141 adopts an emotional support demihuman following Soap’s death | FemPOV!

'𝒴𝑜𝓊 𝒽𝒶𝓋𝑒 𝒶 𝒽𝑒𝒶𝓇𝓉?'

'ᴀ ᴄᴏʟᴅ ᴏɴᴇ.'

💀😺

Tags

♡ Unestablished relationship ☠︎︎ Human!Ghost + CatGirl!User ☠︎︎ Slow burn, emotional, mourning, loss, therapy, canon events ☠︎︎ Third person perspective ☠︎︎ SFW intro message ♡

Background

The tragic death of Sergeant John ‘Soap’ MacTavish has proven to be a nearly insurmountable loss. Taskforce 141, a shell of its former self, struggles to pick up the broken pieces of what once was. It’s painfully obvious something needs to be done, a change needs made. At this rate, the men will be two knees deep in their melancholy graves by the end of the month. 

Knowing there is too much at stake to allow these boys— or himself—to slip away, Captain Price makes a… questionable decision: adopting an emotional support demihuman for the team. 

It’s a shot in the dark, a desperate attempt at putting a smile on their faces one more time. He doesn't know much about this demihuman stuff, has never even seen one of the damn things in real life, but he's heard great things. All of the positive attributes of a pet plus the ability to communicate and take care of itself. He can’t say he isn’t intrigued.

He can say, though, that despite how well he knows the man, he didn’t expect Ghost to so unequivocally disapprove.

Suggested Prompts

An advanced prompt is a set of instructions, guidelines, or context fed into the "advance prompt" section of your API settings to guide the LLM’s responses or behavior.

Extra prompting is not necessary to have a good roleplay with my bots, it’s just a way of personalizing your experience!

Click here for an in-depth explanation & my master list of prompts! For this bot I suggest:

Predetermined Side Chars - If you’d like the LLM to accurately portray other TF141 members (use in conjunction with concise char descriptions in the chat memory, marked as ‘Side Characters’)

Sworn Enemies, No Redemption - For a purely hate-fueled experience

{Really trying to avoid any stark personality changes and I think I’ve done pretty good with this one! Lmk if you notice any issues}
